'''âh-b-p-j''' ('''kahabpejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tupelize|tupelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tupelize|tupelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-b-p-j
|-
! Lemma
| kahabpejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihabpejoko|thihabpejoko]] || [[word:jihabpejoko|jihabpejoko]] || [[word:shihabpejoko|shihabpejoko]] || [[word:kihabpejoko|kihabpejoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
